title: (Bullish Signal) PBR enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Mar 30, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that PBR's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 86 similar cases where PBR's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 75 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $8.46 crossed the resistance line at $8.50 and is trading between $8.50 resistance and $8.39 resistance lines. The price rose +3% throughout the month of 02/26/21 - 03/30/21, but remained unchanged during the week of 03/23/21 - 03/30/21.

https://preview.redd.it/uc251edkwdq61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=2df7db63fa7a679db575ff89529aad147b546389

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where PBR's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 21 of 25 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for PBR just turned positive on March 11, 2021. Looking at past instances where PBR's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 28 of 41 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 68%.

The 50-day Moving Average for PBR moved above the 200-day moving average on December 04, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +1.37% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where PBR advanced for three days, in 261 of 331 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

PBR may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10295904-petroleo-brasileiro-s-a-petrobras-adr-pbr-8-15-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-mar-30-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
